titleStmt.title: SII 39.87: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 87. (A.R. No. 87 of 1916.) TIRUKKĀḶAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. KAKŌLANATHA TEMPLE-ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE SAME TEMPLE.

summary.p: This inscription mentions an order of Gāṅgēyarāja regarding the offerings and renovation to be made in the shrine of Āḷuḍaiyanāchchiyār built in the same temple by Tamiḻappallava-daraiyaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī Aruḷic ceyal
puṟamalai nāṭṭut tirukkoḷakku
ṭi śrīvabraāhmaṇiril Akastiya kotti
rattuyiṉpaṉ Uñcāṉāṉa poṟ
koyil paṭṭaṉukku yivvūr śrīvadharmma
śvaramuṭaiyār koyillil tamiḻa
pallavataraiyar Eḻuntaruḷivitta Ā
ḷuṭaiya nācciyāṟkku tiruppaṭimāṟṟu
ḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nivantaṅkaḷuk
kum tirunaāḷ Eḻuntaruḷukaikku tiru
kkaāmakkoṭṭapuṟa Iṟaiyil Iruvi
kkavum tiruppaṇi cevikkavum tā
ṉ Uccāyittut tirikaiyālle I
ṉṉācciyār Amutu ceytaruḷiṉa
coṟṟile taṉakkum taṉvaṟkattāṟ
kkum nāṉāḻi Aricic coṟu peṟuvatāka Ava
ṉi nārāyaṇa tevaṟkum tāṉattārkkum nam
mālai potakkāṭṭac coṉṉem nammo
laime piṭipāṭākak koṇṭu I
ppaṭi cantirātittavaṟ celvatākac
kallilum cempillum veṭṭivit
tu koḷkaḥ Ivai kāṅkeya rāja
ṉ Eḻuttu ḥ~ṁ śrī māheśvararakṣai
Digital edition of SII 39.87 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
